microsoft_ft: Served as the **technical backbone** for Azure resilience engagements, leading structured discovery to map enterprise environments, integration needs, and SaaS architecture requirements across Fortune 500 customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), driving **$14M+** in business impact.

Drove complex, technically intricate deals forward by translating ambiguous customer requirements into clear solution architectures and deployment plans, sustaining **45+ annual** validation drills under direct executive visibility.

Delivered audience-specific technical demonstrations and proof points to stakeholders ranging from CSOs to network engineers, adapting depth in real time to build credibility and advance a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+** enterprise contract.

Built **repeatable processes** and a reusable library of customer-facing technical assets — diagrams, runbooks, and discovery frameworks — that scaled a 2-person operation into a platformized self-service system, reducing operational toil by **30%**.

Engaged IT, InfoSec, and network stakeholders on API integrations, network isolation, and firewall/allowlisting requirements, owning clean technical handoffs to implementation and ensuring deployment plans and open risks were fully documented.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive testing capability, delivering a rack-level program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate** that surfaced critical hardware defects and established a new model for continuous, well-documented technical validation.

Scaled team leverage with **AI-powered tooling**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by **39%** while increasing drill capacity by 21% across the engineering org.
microsoft_2023: Drove **technical adoption** of AI-powered code generation by leading tailored user demos and hands-on training sessions, advancing utilization across **14 key teams** and saving 37 engineering hours monthly through consultative enablement.

Led consultative discovery with **11+ Azure service teams**, asking sharp questions to map product value to specific pain points and influencing the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation that closed critical feature gaps.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by defining rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting technical lookup time by **83%** and removing a recurring field bottleneck.

Mobilized a technical strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, running structured discovery with **20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across **140+ teams**, giving leadership the data-backed visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact technical support.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process in a fast-moving environment.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and removing recurring deployment blockers.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** and standing up a repeatable CRM process that streamlined the full sales cycle.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to better map value to prospect needs.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks with clear, data-backed recommendations.

tailoring_notes: Reframed Azure resilience FT role as the 'technical backbone' SE narrative: discovery, solution architecture, demos to mixed CSO/network audiences, and clean technical handoffs.
Surfaced JD vocabulary throughout: SaaS architecture, API integrations, firewall/allowlisting, InfoSec, repeatable processes, AI-powered, and enterprise sales cycle ownership.
Mapped existing $14M/$1.5B/$3M outcomes to enterprise-deal credibility and process-building, the two strongest SE signals in the JD.
Emphasized 'build process, not just execute tasks' and cross-functional collaboration with Implementation/Product/Engineering to match the high-ownership, scale-the-team framing.
Skills reordered to lead with SE-core competencies (discovery, demos, MEDDPICC, networking, virtualization) and preferred-qual technologies before generic PM skills.
